top3.sql:
SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName, 
    District, 
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
WHERE School LIKE '%Administrator%'
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName,
    District,
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName,
    District,
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    TRIM(SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1)) AS FirstName, 
    District, 
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
WHERE School LIKE '%Administrator%'
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName, 
    District, 
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
WHERE School LIKE '%Administrator%'
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName, 
    District, 
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
WHERE School LIKE '%Admin%' OR School LIKE '%Administrator%' OR School LIKE '%Principal%' OR School LIKE '%Superintendent%'
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName,
    District,
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    SUBSTR(School, 1, INSTR(School || ' ', ' ') - 1) AS FirstName, 
    District, 
    COUNT(*) AS Count
FROM schools
WHERE School LIKE '%Administrator%'
GROUP BY FirstName, District
ORDER BY Count DESC
LIMIT 2;
